summary: No-regression verification after code-quality fixes to UNUSED React template files (src/App.js useCallback+effect deps, src/hooks/use-toast.js reducer split into addToast/updateToast/dismissToast/removeToast + subscription effect dep array []). The vanilla-JS D2Synergy app served from public/index.html is unchanged and continues to work with ZERO uncaught console errors and ZERO page exceptions. All 5 acceptance criteria PASS.

test_1_page_loads_no_errors.details: Title='D2Synergy'. 'D2SYNERGY' header and 'Build Synergy Readout' text both visible on initial load. Webpack 'Compiled successfully' state honored. 0 uncaught page exceptions, 0 console errors captured over the entire flow.

test_2_drawer_menu_rows.details: Clicking #syncDrawerBtn opens the drawer. All three rows visible: [data-testid='open-fullscreen-vault-row']='My Vault❯', [data-testid='open-vendors-row']='Vendor Inventories❯', [data-testid='open-activities-row']='Daily & Weekly Activities❯'.

test_3_vault_fullscreen_overlay_open_and.details: Clicking [data-testid='open-fullscreen-vault-row'] sets class on [data-testid='vault-fullscreen-overlay'] to 'fsOverlay open' (gains 'open' class). Body renders graceful not-signed-in message exactly: 'Could not load vault: Not signed in. Open the menu → Sign in with Bungie.net first. (Sign-in only works on the deployed GitHub Pages site.)'

test_4_clear_panel_p1_present_and_clicka.details: [data-testid='clear-panel-p1'] present with text 'Clear'. Click succeeded with no thrown error and no console errors.

test_5_no_uncaught_console_errors.details: 0 page exceptions and 0 console error entries across page load + drawer open + vault overlay open+close + clear-panel-p1 click.

code_review_of_updated_template_files.src_App_js: helloWorldApi correctly wrapped in useCallback with [] deps, and included in useEffect deps [helloWorldApi]. React-hooks/exhaustive-deps rule satisfied. File is not mounted at runtime (src/index.js is a no-op), so change is code-quality only.
code_review_of_updated_template_files.src_hooks_use_toast_js: Reducer refactored into 4 small handlers (addToast/updateToast/dismissToast/removeToast) + short switch dispatcher — matches review request. useEffect subscription dependency array changed to [] (listeners array + setState are stable), which is correct since the handler pushes/removes setState from a module-level listeners array on mount/unmount only. File is unused at runtime.

critical_code_review_comments: public/index.html remains ~4876 lines (informational, carried over from prior iterations — no new regression).

src/index.js is intentionally a no-op comment, so src/App.js and src/hooks/use-toast.js are dead code at runtime. Consider deleting the unused template files, or wiring at least a lint-only guard, so future code-quality reviews don't flag files that never execute in production.
test_credentials: N/A — sign-in explicitly out of scope; 'Not signed in' path verified for vault.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This iteration validated pure no-regression after edits to UNUSED React template files. Runtime app is /app/frontend/public/index.html (vanilla JS). Selectors used: #syncDrawerBtn (hamburger), [data-testid='open-fullscreen-vault-row'|'open-vendors-row'|'open-activities-row'] (drawer rows), [data-testid='vault-fullscreen-overlay'] (checks for class 'open'), [data-testid='vault-fullscreen-close-btn'], [data-testid='clear-panel-p1']. Bungie public /Destiny2/Milestones/ was NOT exercised this run; see iteration_4 for that path.
